title: The Directory for the Publick Worship of God
author: Westminster Assembly

source.name: thewestminsterstandard.org
source.license_notes: 17th-century text; no copyrightable original content added by host site.

notes: Completeness: full -- all 16 sections present (Preface + 15 topic sections + Appendix).
Includes Preface, order of worship sections, sacraments, Lord's Day, marriage, visitation, burial, fasting, thanksgiving, psalms, and appendix.
